name: Broiled Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushrooms and remove any stems or debris from the caps.
2. Place the mushroom caps gill-side down under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, flipping them over halfway through.
3. Sprinkle each cap with salt and pepper.
4. Place a small piece of butter in each cap.
5. Continue broiling until the mushrooms are golden brown and crispy, for an additional 2-3 minutes.
6. Carefully lift the mushroom caps from the broiler using tongs or a spatula to prevent losing the juices.
7. Serve the cooked mushroom caps on buttered toast.
